```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.7em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.05em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);text-align:left;border-top:4px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
    <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="git-fork" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">non-negotiable 01</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;">You own every<br>data decision</div>
    </div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.55em;">What to keep, drop, transform, impute, model, exclude &mdash; and <strong>why</strong>.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.25em;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#2C8475;">drop</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#2C8475;">impute</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#2C8475;">model</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#2C8475;">exclude</span>
   </div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.05em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);text-align:left;border-top:4px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
    <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:#EEEDF8;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#5654A2;"><i data-lucide="clipboard-list" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div>
     <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;">non-negotiable 02</div>
     <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;">You write the<br>methods section</div>
    </div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#564232;line-height:1.55;margin-bottom:0.55em;">The audit trail of your analysis. The one piece you should <strong>never</strong> delegate.</div>
   <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.25em;">
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#5654A2;">choices</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#5654A2;">why</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;background:#EEEDF8;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;color:#5654A2;">defense</span>
   </div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.95em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;font-style:italic;">
  everything else can flex
 </div>

</div>
```
